CREATE TABLE test_table_32 (id UInt32, value String);
CREATE TABLE test_table_64 (id UInt64, value String);
SELECT murmurHash2_32(id, value) FROM test_table_32 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT murmurHash2_64(value, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) FROM test_table_64 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT murmurHash2_64(id, value, array(1, 2, 3)) FROM test_table_64 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table_64 WHERE value LIKE 'example%');
SELECT murmurHash2_32(Tuple(id, value), Tuple(1, 'test1')) AS hash_value FROM test_table_32;
SELECT DISTINCT murmurHash2_32(value) FROM test_table_32 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, murmurHash2_64(value) AS hash_value FROM test_table_64 ORDER BY hash_value DESC;
WITH (SELECT value FROM test_table_32 WHERE id = 1) AS subquery_value SELECT murmurHash2_32(subquery_value, 'additionalString') AS combined_hash;
SELECT murmurHash2_32(value AS another_type) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table_32 UNION SELECT value FROM test_table_32 WHERE id < 3) AS combined_table;
SELECT id, murmurHash2_64(value) FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table_64 WHERE id = 3) AS inner_query;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, value String, relation_id UInt32);
SELECT murmurHash2_64(c.value, ct.value) FROM complex_table ct JOIN test_table_64 c ON ct.relation_id = c.id WHERE ct.id = 2;
